mapper.sql: id, work_record_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, status, reason, reply, create_time, handle_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_record_transfer (work_record_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, status, reason) VALUES (#{workRecordId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{status}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM work_record_transfer WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM work_record_transfer WHERE work_record_id = #{workRecordId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM work_record_transfer WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM work_record_transfer WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = 0
